meta_title: For Freelancers: analytics setup to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to analytics setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Analytics Setup to Solve Marketing Gaps
content.seo_description: Learn how to master analytics setup and overcome marketing skill gaps. A high-impact case study for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to drive growth; you need automated data visibility. By integrating Antigravity for event tracking and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you can turn raw user behavior into actionable insights. This setup transforms your blind spots into a repeatable, high-value service for your clients.
content.intro:
You’ve shipped the product, the UI is pixel-perfect, and the code is clean. But when your client asks, 'Where are the conversions coming from?', you find yourself staring at a blank dashboard. The 'marketing gap' isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of visibility. You are building in the dark, and your clients are paying for guesswork instead of growth.

It is time to stop treating analytics as an afterthought. By leveraging modern AI-driven tooling, you can instrument a professional-grade telemetry stack in hours, not weeks. This guide turns you from a 'just-code' freelancer into a growth-focused partner, ensuring every feature you ship is backed by hard data.

steps.title: Define Your Telemetry Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, define exactly which user actions drive revenue. We focus on 'North Star' metrics like button clicks, form submissions, and page depths.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a SaaS analytics tracking plan. Include events for user_signup, feature_click, and subscription_checkout. Map these to a generic event-tracking interface.

steps.title: Implement Event Hooks
steps.description: Inject tracking logic into your existing codebase without cluttering business logic. We use decorators or middleware to maintain clean architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript decorator for tracking function execution time and input parameters to a central analytics service.

steps.title: Configure Antigravity Integration
steps.description: Connect your event stream to your analytics warehouse. Antigravity handles the batching and delivery, ensuring zero impact on frontend performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a configuration module for Antigravity that buffers event batches and sends them to a posthog or mixpanel endpoint.

steps.title: Automate Report Generation
steps.description: Don't manually check dashboards. Use Claude Code to create an automated summary script that parses your telemetry data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that fetches the last 7 days of event data and calculates the conversion rate for the 'signup' funnel.

steps.title: Client-Ready Dashboard Export
steps.description: Format your insights into a clean, professional PDF or slide deck that justifies your value as a high-tier freelancer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Markdown report template that summarizes key performance indicators for a non-technical client.

pro_tips: Always track 'Exit Intent' events; they are the highest signal for feature friction.
Use unique identifiers for sessions to map user journeys across multiple devices.
Implement 'Data Sampling' if your traffic exceeds 100k requests/day to keep costs predictable.
Automate your analytics tests in CI/CD; broken tracking is as bad as a broken checkout flow.
Create a 'Growth Audit' service tier for your clients—analytics setup is a high-margin recurring product.
content.next_steps: Deploy your telemetry branch to staging, verify events in the dashboard, and then present the first weekly growth report to your existing client.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing and start shipping data-backed features that prove your worth to every client. Master the stack that separates the amateurs from the high-earning experts. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
